side_effects.description: Initially hypersensitive to sting; required dilution of 1mg/30 units to tolerate. After a month of zinc supplements, reduced to a slight burn 4-5 minutes post-injection at 1mg/2 units.

protocol_notes: Started with high dilution (1mg/30 units) due to hypersensitivity. After one month of zinc supplementation, now using 1mg/2 units with only mild burn.
